index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang='en'>
<head>
<meta charset='UTF-8'>
<title>Match-3</title>
<style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#0d0020;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh}canvas{display:block;cursor:pointer}</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id='c' width='600' height='420'></canvas>
<script>
const cv=document.getElementById('c'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
const W=600,H=420;
const COLS=7,ROWS=6,GS=60,GAP=4;
const COLORS=['#ee3333','#ff9900','#ffcc00','#44cc44','#2299ff','#aa22ff'];
const CELL=GS+GAP;
const OX=Math.floor((W-COLS*CELL+GAP)/2);
const OY=50;
let grid,selected,score,chainMult,timeLeft,gameOver,startTime,falling;
function randGem(){return Math.floor(Math.random()*6);}
function initGrid(){
  grid=[];
  for(let r=0;r<ROWS;r++){grid[r]=[];for(let c=0;c<COLS;c++)grid[r][c]=randGem();}
  while(findMatches().length>0){for(let r=0;r<ROWS;r++)for(let c=0;c<COLS;c++)grid[r][c]=randGem();}
}
function init(){
  initGrid();selected=null;score=0;chainMult=1;timeLeft=60;
  gameOver=false;startTime=Date.now();falling=false;
}
function findMatches(){
  const matched=new Set();
  for(let r=0;r<ROWS;r++){let run=1;for(let c=1;c<COLS;c++){if(grid[r][c]===grid[r][c-1]&&grid[r][c]!==-1){run++;}else{if(run>=3)for(let k=c-run;k<c;k++)matched.add(r+','+k);run=1;}if(run>=3)for(let k=COLS-run;k<COLS;k++)matched.add(r+','+k);}
  }
  for(let c=0;c<COLS;c++){let run=1;for(let r=1;r<ROWS;r++){if(grid[r][c]===grid[r-1][c]&&grid[r][c]!==-1){run++;}else{if(run>=3)for(let k=r-run;k<r;k++)matched.add(k+','+c);run=1;}if(run>=3)for(let k=ROWS-run;k<ROWS;k++)matched.add(k+','+c);}
  }
  return Array.from(matched).map(s=>{const[r,c]=s.split(',').map(Number);return{r,c};});
}
function scoreMatches(matches){
  const byGroup={};
  matches.forEach(m=>{
    const key=grid[m.r][m.c];
    if(!byGroup[key])byGroup[key]=0;
    byGroup[key]++;
  });
  let pts=0;
  Object.values(byGroup).forEach(n=>{
    if(n>=5)pts+=200;else if(n===4)pts+=80;else if(n>=3)pts+=30;
  });
  return pts*chainMult;
}
function applyGravity(){
  let moved=false;
  for(let c=0;c<COLS;c++){
    let writeR=ROWS-1;
    for(let r=ROWS-1;r>=0;r--)if(grid[r][c]!==-1){grid[writeR][c]=grid[r][c];if(writeR!==r)moved=true;writeR--;}
    for(let r=writeR;r>=0;r--){grid[r][c]=randGem();moved=true;}
  }
  return moved;
}
function processChain(){
  const matches=findMatches();
  if(matches.length===0){chainMult=1;falling=false;return;}
  score+=scoreMatches(matches);
  matches.forEach(m=>{grid[m.r][m.c]=-1;});
  applyGravity();
  chainMult++;
  setTimeout(processChain,300);
}
function trySwap(r1,c1,r2,c2){
  const tmp=grid[r1][c1];grid[r1][c1]=grid[r2][c2];grid[r2][c2]=tmp;
  const matches=findMatches();
  if(matches.length===0){const t2=grid[r1][c1];grid[r1][c1]=grid[r2][c2];grid[r2][c2]=t2;}
  else{score+=scoreMatches(matches);matches.forEach(m=>{grid[m.r][m.c]=-1;});applyGravity();chainMult=2;falling=true;setTimeout(processChain,300);}
}
function cellAt(mx,my){
  const c=Math.floor((mx-OX)/CELL),r=Math.floor((my-OY)/CELL);
  if(c>=0&&c<COLS&&r>=0&&r<ROWS)return{r,c};
  return null;
}
cv.addEventListener('click',e=>{
  if(gameOver){init();return;}
  if(falling)return;
  const rect=cv.getBoundingClientRect();
  const mx=e.clientX-rect.left,my=e.clientY-rect.top;
  const cell=cellAt(mx,my);
  if(!cell)return;
  if(!selected){selected=cell;return;}
  if(selected.r===cell.r&&selected.c===cell.c){selected=null;return;}
  const dr=Math.abs(cell.r-selected.r),dc=Math.abs(cell.c-selected.c);
  if(dr+dc===1){trySwap(selected.r,selected.c,cell.r,cell.c);selected=null;}
  else{selected=cell;}
});
function update(){
  if(gameOver)return;
  const elapsed=(Date.now()-startTime)/1000;
  timeLeft=Math.max(0,60-elapsed);
  if(timeLeft<=0)gameOver=true;
}
function drawGem(c,r,color,highlight,matched){
  const x=OX+c*CELL,y=OY+r*CELL;
  ctx.fillStyle=matched?'rgba(255,255,255,0.4)':color;
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.roundRect?ctx.roundRect(x,y,GS,GS,6):ctx.rect(x,y,GS,GS);ctx.fill();
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.25)';
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.roundRect?ctx.roundRect(x+4,y+4,GS-8,12,4):ctx.rect(x+4,y+4,GS-8,12);ctx.fill();
  if(highlight){
    ctx.strokeStyle='#ffd700';ctx.lineWidth=3;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.roundRect?ctx.roundRect(x+1,y+1,GS-2,GS-2,6):ctx.rect(x+1,y+1,GS-2,GS-2);ctx.stroke();
  }
}
function draw(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#0d0020';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
  const timerFrac=timeLeft/60;
  ctx.fillStyle='#222';ctx.fillRect(10,10,W-20,12);
  ctx.fillStyle=timerFrac>0.4?'#22aaff':timerFrac>0.2?'#ffaa00':'#ff2222';
  ctx.fillRect(10,10,(W-20)*timerFrac,12);
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='bold 13px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.fillText('Time: '+Math.ceil(timeLeft)+'s',W/2,22);
  ctx.textAlign='left';ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,10,42);
  ctx.textAlign='right';ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='10px monospace';
  ctx.fillText('Click gem, then adjacent gem to swap',590,42);
  for(let r=0;r<ROWS;r++){
    for(let c=0;c<COLS;c++){
      const v=grid[r][c];
      if(v===-1)continue;
      const isSel=selected&&selected.r===r&&selected.c===c;
      drawGem(c,r,COLORS[v],isSel,false);
    }
  }
  if(gameOver){
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.8)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.fillStyle='#ff4455';ctx.font='bold 44px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('GAME OVER',W/2,170);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='22px monospace';ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,W/2,225);
    ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='15px monospace';ctx.fillText('Click to play again',W/2,270);
  }
}
function loop(){update();draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop);}
init();loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
